message:
feat: add spawn_targeted for window-aware tab creation and layout restore

Add SpawnTarget struct and spawn_targeted to WeztermInterface trait for
creating tabs in specific windows. Implement in MockWezterm with proper
window/tab ID tracking and atomic counters. Fix split_pane to inherit
parent window_id instead of hardcoded 0.

Rework restore_window to use spawn_targeted so tabs land in the correct
window. Return bool indicating whether any tabs were restored. Track
restored_window_id for reuse across tabs. Add AlwaysFailSpawnWezterm
and AlwaysFailSplitWezterm mocks.

Add route_for_window_id to ShardedWeztermClient for spawn_targeted
routing by window ID. Reject ambiguous window IDs across shards.

Add mock implementations in session_restore, workflows, and watchdog.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
